title: Transcript:Gertrude's cat (NPC)
wikitext:
{{Transcript|NPC}}
{{Transcript list|Gertrude's cat (NPC)|Cat}}

==Standard dialogue==
===In the Lumberyard after [[Gertrude's Cat]]===
====With a [[Catspeak amulet]]====
=====With a kitten or cat in your inventory or following you=====
* '''Player:''' Hello Fluffs.
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' Purrrrr! So you can talk to cats now?
* '''Player:''' Yes, I got this amulet from a Sphinx.
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' Well, I should thank you for finding my kitten that time. I have a terrible time keeping track of them, and I never know how many Gertrude has managed to sell.
* {{qact|The player's cat is removed from the inventory and begins to follow the player}}
* '''Cat:''' Hi Mommy!
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' Hello dear!
* '''Player:''' Aww, that's sweet.
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' Is [player name] looking after you well?
* '''Cat:''' No complaints, Mom.
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' Good, good. That's what I like to hear.
* {{tact|end}}

=====Without a kitten or cat=====
* '''Player:''' Hello Fluffs.
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' Purrrrr! So you can talk to cats now?
* '''Player:''' Yes, I got this amulet from a Sphinx.
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' Well, I should thank you for finding my kitten that time. I have a terrible time keeping track of them, and I never know how many Gertrude has managed to sell.
* '''Player:''' They're cute little creatures, aren't they?
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' Purrrrr!
* {{tbox|Fluffs looks proud.}}
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' My children have always been popular with adventurers. They inherit their father's adventurous spirit. He's always travelling the world, when he can find some kind person to help him open doors!
* '''Player:''' Look after yourself, Fluffs.
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' You too, [player name].

===In Varrock Ratpits===
====With a [[Catspeak amulet]]====
* '''Player:''' Hey, aren't you Gertrude's cat?
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' What's it to you?
* '''Player:''' Well seeing as I've had to go off and fetch you for Gertrude already...
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' Oh would you ever quit worrying, I come down here to watch the fights all the time.
* '''Player:''' Really?
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' Oh yes, it's a great place for catching a bit of tail.
* '''Player:''' Ummm, ok. I'll leave you to it then.
* {{tact|end}}

====Without a [[Catspeak amulet]] or partial completion of Dragon Slayer II====
* '''Player:''' Hey, aren't you Gertrude's cat?
* '''Gertrude's cat:''' Miaow!
* {{tact|end}}
